official_sources.authority_note: Official binary source for constructing the Play clientbound set_entity_motion fixture.
Official binary source for entity id plus low-precision Vec3 movement body codec.
Official binary source for the Play clientbound packet table and set_entity_motion packet id.

field_notes.entity_id: Primitive entity id fixture; does not prove entity existence.
field_notes.movement: Primitive Vec3 movement fixture encoded by official Vec3.LP_STREAM_CODEC; does not prove runtime movement application.

stop_boundary: Proves Play clientbound set_entity_motion packet framing and dispatch/decode for one primitive entity id plus movement fixture only; do not infer entity existence, movement semantics, world state, render readiness, or client-load completion.
